description_long: This skateboard features a natural wood deck with a light tan finish and a prominent graphic of a stylized human face in the center. The deck is equipped with four white wheels attached to silver metal trucks, which are mounted in the standard configuration. The wheels are classic street style, medium-sized, and appear to be made of polyurethane. The trucks are metallic with a standard kingpin design and are securely fastened to the deck. There is no visible grip tape on the top surface, leaving the wood grain and deck artwork fully exposed. The overall design is clean and minimalistic, with the main visual interest coming from the central face graphic and subtle branding text.
description: A natural wood skateboard with a stylized face graphic on the deck, white street wheels, and silver standard trucks. The deck is unadorned by grip tape, highlighting the wood grain and artwork.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skateboard's concave deck profile, white wheels, and silver trucks, with the face graphic partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded nose of the deck, both front wheels, and the central face graphic clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the skateboard's concave shape, wheels, and trucks, with the face graphic visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tail of the deck, both rear wheels, and the face graphic partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, simple text logo appears near the center of the deck, reading 'lineville' in lowercase letters, in a brownish color.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The main graphic design features a stylized, cartoon-like human face with brown hair and neutral expression, centrally placed on the natural wood deck. The style is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on the face. The text 'lineville' is printed below the face in a matching brown color.
attribute_wheel_type: Classic street wheels, medium-sized, solid white, with no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard silver metal trucks with a traditional kingpin design, no visible branding or unique features.
